'''tagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palaeontographically|palaeontographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palaeontographically|palaeontographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tagate|tagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tagatesher|tagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagatesherĂ«m|tagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tagatero|tagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tagateshĂ«|tagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagateshĂ«m|tagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitagatero|gokitagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitagateshĂ«|gokitagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagateshĂ«m|gokitagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotagankerom|gotagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotagankeshĂ«|gotagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotagankeshĂ«m|gotagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotagankeya|gotagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tagaterom|tagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagatemu|tagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tagateya|tagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitagaterom|gokitagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagatemu|gokitagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitagateya|gokitagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tagagate|tagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tagagatesher|tagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagagatesherĂ«m|tagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tagagatero|tagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tagagateshĂ«|tagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagagateshĂ«m|tagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitagagatero|gokitagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitagagateshĂ«|gokitagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagagateshĂ«m|gokitagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotagagankerom|gotagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotagagankeshĂ«|gotagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotagagankeshĂ«m|gotagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotagagankeya|gotagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tagagaterom|tagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagagatemu|tagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tagagateya|tagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitagagaterom|gokitagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagagatemu|gokitagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitagagateya|gokitagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠte|tĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠtesher|tĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠtero|tĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠgĂŠtero|gokitĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠterom|tĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠtemu|tĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠgĂŠteya|tĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠgĂŠterom|gokitĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠgĂŠteya|gokitĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafgafte|tafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafgaftesher|tafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafgaftesherĂ«m|tafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafgaftero|tafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafgafteshĂ«|tafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafgafteshĂ«m|tafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafgaftero|gokitafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafgafteshĂ«|gokitafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafgafteshĂ«m|gokitafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafgafnkerom|gotafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafgafnkeshĂ«|gotafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafgafnkeshĂ«m|gotafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafgafnkeya|gotafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafgafterom|tafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafgaftemu|tafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafgafteya|tafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafgafterom|gokitafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafgaftemu|gokitafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafgafteya|gokitafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
